calendar.matters:
Verified Petition For Order Determining Trust'S Title To Real Property (Heggstad Petition)
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roxana Jaurequi for and with Joyce Wong and Cortina Wong (Co-Trustees).

Ms. Jaurequi stated that the bank said that all of the records were either shredded or they were not able to access records going that far back, that the trust and the will were created on the same day, that it is a pour over will and that it puts everything over to the trust. Ms. Jaurequi also stated that the Washington Mutual account was created after the trust was established, that it is her understanding that the $10,000.00 used to open the account came from the Citi Bank account, but they could not get those records, that at this point and time they can not trace it back and they can't get bank records prior to 2012. The Petition for Order Determining Trust's Title to Real Property is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
